name: dokki-mcp
description: Expose Dokki's hosted MCP endpoint to Codex with OAuth.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Dokki workspace tools.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex directly to Dokki's hosted MCP endpoint for workspace documents, tables, artifacts, file uploads and downloads, search, and resource management. Codex uses Dokki OAuth during installation so you can choose the Personal and Org workspaces this plugin may access.
defaultPrompt: Create a Dokki table from this data.
Build a Dokki artifact for this chart.
